panels.title: Running jobs
panels.description: Current running jobs across the fleet from the latest total sample.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: running job total sample" | stats max(running_jobs) as running_jobs

panels.title: Active containers
panels.description: Session sandbox containers recorded on active sessions.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(sandbox_containers) as active_containers | stats sum(active_containers) as active_containers

panels.title: Allocated RAM
panels.description: Current memory allocation across active container usage events.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(active_memory_allocated_mb) as memory_mb | stats sum(memory_mb) as memory_mb

panels.title: Active previews
panels.description: Current active previews by worker ownership.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(active_previews) as active_previews | stats sum(active_previews) as active_previews

panels.title: Running jobs by worker and type
panels.description: Current running jobs grouped by owning worker and job type.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: running job sample" | stats by (worker_node_id, job_type) max(running) as running | sort by (worker_node_id asc, running desc)

panels.title: Container allocation by worker
panels.description: Current active container allocation totals from container usage events, grouped by session worker owner.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id, node_status) max(active_usage_containers) as active_usage_containers, max(sandbox_containers) as session_containers, max(active_memory_allocated_mb) as active_memory_allocated_mb, max(active_cpu_allocated) as active_cpu_allocated, max(active_disk_allocated_mb) as active_disk_allocated_mb, max(running_sessions) as running_sessions, max(active_previews) as active_previews | sort by (active_memory_allocated_mb desc, active_usage_containers desc)

panels.title: Allocated RAM by worker
panels.description: Memory allocated to active sandbox containers over time.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(active_memory_allocated_mb) as active_memory_allocated_mb
_msg:"platform health: worker load sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(sandbox_containers) as active_containers

panels.title: Host CPU utilization
panels.description: Worker host CPU utilization from /proc samples.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: host resource sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(host_cpu_util) as host_cpu_util

panels.title: Host RAM utilization
panels.description: Worker host memory utilization from /proc samples.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: host resource sample" | stats by (worker_node_id) max(host_memory_util) as host_memory_util

panels.title: Queue by type
panels.description: Ready, delayed, running, and dead-letter jobs by type.

targets.expr: _msg:"platform health: job queue sample" | stats by (queue, job_type) max(pending_runnable) as ready, max(pending_deferred) as delayed, max(running) as running, max(dead_letter) as dead_letter, max(oldest_runnable_age_seconds) as oldest_wait_seconds | sort by (running desc, ready desc, dead_letter desc)
